user_task_description: The deck's slides are out of logical order.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Reorder the slides so the presentation flows in the sequence: Executive Summary -> Root Cause -> Implementation Plan -> Appendix.
atomic_scope: Only slide reordering is explicitly requested in this task.
expected_output_type: A revised .pptx deck with corrected slide order.

notes.Latent Issues Intentionally Left In The:
- The deck has no polished theme
- The slide layouts are very plain
- Some text could be tightened, but that is not the explicit request
